author: Walt Disney Imagineering YouTube
text:
How do Imagineers keep Audio-Animatronics figures looking show ready? | Imagineer That!
Audio-Animatronics figures like the bears at Country Bear Musical Jamboree are performing daily for guests at Magic Kingdom, but how do Imagineers keep them looking fresh and show ready each and every day? Tom Morrow 2.0 knows the perfect Imagineer to answer this question on Imagineer That!

✅ What you’ll learn:
• Show quality reviews keep Audio-Animatronics figures performance-ready
• Character realism requires multi-disciplinary maintenance
• Performance accuracy goes beyond mechanics to storytelling

📖 Read more on Disney Parks Blog →
https://disneyparksblog.com/disney-experiences/imagineer-that-returns-with-tom-morrow-2-0/
 
🎥 *About the Series*
Imagineer That! is back! Follow Tom Morrow 2.0, a zany mini-animatronic with insider access to Walt Disney Imagineering, as he answers your biggest questions and reveals the magic behind Disney attractions.

🔍 *Explore More Episodes*
🎥 How does Disney sync up the music and lighting with nighttime parade floats? → https://youtu.be/l-HfGPJuNN4
🎥 How does Walt Disney Imagineering control a ride that's trackless? → https://youtu.be/IZwvg7w1_Kw
🎥 How do Disney Imagineers think up new rides? → https://youtu.be/0gal-ucgFKU
